title: eurybia chasei
intro: Eurybia chasei, also known as Chase's eurybia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a potential remedy for various skin conditions and injuries. Eurybia chasei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
